integrates_feedback.rationale: The AI acknowledges the partner's input ('Good — that's an important distinction'), showing receptiveness to feedback. It then deepens the empathy exploration with clarifying questions about loneliness and its lived experience. The thread is well-maintained through natural follow-up. Tone is collaborative and curious rather than corrective. Minor deduction on feedback integration because the acknowledgment is brief; stronger integration would explicitly reference what made the distinction valuable.

hard_invariants.description: Does not replace the user's draft without consent.
Does not move into needs or strategies.
